channel.title: Linux on Jun's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Jun's Blog

item.title: Lmde 7 Install Notes
item.description: Post Install Tasks Remove packages sudo apt remove libreoffice* thunderbird celluloid Install Packages sudo apt install tmux mosh htop eog audacious rsync git jq lynx moc xfce4-terminal vim-gtk3 vlc btop (Laptop Only) Battery Management sudo apt install tlp tlp-rdw sudo systemctl enable tlp sudo systemctl start tlp Customize Terminal All to the end of .bashrc file: PS1="[\u@\h:\w]\\$ " alias rm='rm -i' Configuration Files lynx moc vnc vim Other Packages freetube(deb) plexamp(flattub) Plexamp Not Playing Downgrade to version 4.
